evals.prompt: Show me the open review findings on deliverable 10.
evals.expected_output: Reads the open scoring findings on deliverable 10.

evals.prompt: Mute review issue 55 — it's already tracked in JIRA-123.
evals.expected_output: Mutes issue 55 with an explanatory note.

evals.prompt: Review my current branch against the specs for project 1 and give me a local consistency report.
evals.expected_output: Fetches fresh deliverables and produces a local report without auto-posting comments.
